name: Paysign, Inc.
summary: Paysign, Inc. is a vertically integrated provider of prepaid card products and processing services for corporate, consumer, and government entities, headquartered in Nevada and traded on Nasdaq as PAYS. The company manages all aspects of the prepaid card lifecycle and offers solutions including corporate incentives, healthcare reimbursement, pharmaceutical co-pay assistance, donor compensation, clinical trials, GPR cards, and prepaid gift cards. It also provides life science technology solutions for blood and plasma collection organizations under the Apherion brand.
